buildCommand: cd ../.. && OD_WEB_OUTPUT_MODE=server pnpm --filter @agentik-design/web build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='apps/web/package.json',j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));delete j.type;fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(j,null,2));console.log('[vercel-deploy] removed type:module from apps/web/package.json so Node launcher can require route bundles')"
